version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/xhkqAsByZjs.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
MILES ON IT
AS recorded by Kane Brown, Marshmello
(2024 release)



Capo 3rd fret



[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
New truck, big lift[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Old roads, we've been[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Tearin' up since way back when[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
But these wheels are innocent[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
New hitch, new seats, no history[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
And you just can't fake that[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
So, let's change that[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Girl, let's go put some miles on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Back of the Chevy with the engine runnin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Just you and me in a truck bed wide like a California King[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
We could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Put some miles on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Back of the Chevy with the engine runnin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Just you and me in a truck bed wide like a California King[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Wе could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Put some milеs on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
We could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
All night, no brakes[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
All tail, no gate[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Ain't gotta try too hard[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
My baby's push to start[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
All torque, full speed[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Off-road, on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Zero to a hundred fast[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
My foot ain't touch the gas[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
I said, "Hey, baby, slow it down, let's make it last"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
You said, "Where's the fun in that?"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, let's go, put some miles on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Back of the Chevy with the engine runnin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Just you and me in a truck bed wide like a California King[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
We could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Put some miles on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Back of the Chevy with the engine runnin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Just you and me in a truck bed wide like a California King[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Wе could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Put some milеs on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
We could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Mile after mile after mile after mile[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Turn up the night like that radio dial[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Shoulder to shoulder where nobody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
Know where we're goin', we ain't goin' home[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
We're puttin' miles on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Back of the Chevy with the engine runnin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Just you and me in a truck bed wide like a California King[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
We could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Put some miles on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Back of the Chevy with the engine runnin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Just you and me in a truck bed wide like a California King[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Wе could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Put some milеs on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
We could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Put some miles on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
We could break it in if you know what I mean[/tab]
         N.C.
Put some miles on it
